scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --outfile dist/clooks src/cli.ts
scripts.build:darwin-arm64: tsc --noEmit && mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --target bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/clooks-darwin-arm64 src/cli.ts
scripts.build:darwin-x64: tsc --noEmit && mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --target bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/clooks-darwin-x64 src/cli.ts
scripts.lint:all: bun run lint && bun run lint:sh
